data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a persona onboards new staff with a corporate template. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the outcome of this scenario or any related execution results. The linked use case and prior steps do not offer sufficient context or data to confirm whether the expected result of the scenario behavior being supported or producing a failure report has been achieved.
gaps: No evidence of the onboarding scenario execution or its results.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for onboarding scenario
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the onboarding scenario outcome.
